'''Austogie''' was a southern village on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rhinnal/Legends|Rhinnal]]. It fell within the region controlled by the [[Kieger clan]] and was the hometown of [[Berra Sane]]. She trained as a geologist and was eventually retained by the Kieger clan leader to scout out remote territories for future land grabs..<ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>
